summary.weather: Seoul (Monday, March 30, 2026): Clear skies, no precipitation. Temperatures expected to range between 7.7°C (46°F) and 15.5°C (60°F).
summary.market: KOSPI faces high volatility in March 2026, driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions and AI sector shifts (e.g., 'TurboQuant' algorithm concerns). Foreign investors initiated record sell-offs, absorbed by individual buying. Samsung Electronics ownership hit a 13-year low.
summary.art: Seoul Art Scene (March 2026): Key highlights include the Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum, Damien Hirst at MMCA Seoul, and the '20! 2026 Art Seoul' digital exhibit featuring an 80% refund guarantee to enhance market trust.

system.raw: Dashboard refreshed (1:40 AM). Market: Volatility persists, semiconductor sector pressured by new AI algorithms. Art: Major retrospectives and digital market innovation (guaranteed liquidity) define the month.
